bridge_functions.name: Geolocation.GetCurrentPosition
bridge_functions.description: Retrieves the device's current GPS/network position

bridge_functions.name: Geolocation.CheckPermissions
bridge_functions.description: Returns the current location permission status

bridge_functions.name: Geolocation.RequestPermissions
bridge_functions.description: Prompts the user to grant location permissions

info_plist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to provide location-based features.
info_plist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location in the background and foreground.
